name: Caley | Winter Fishing
description:
“What d’ya say, wanna drink with me? Or you had enough gator action for one day~?”

Art from ForestTheRotten

Unfortunately I made the stupid decision in making a bet with my followers in my discord that I’d make them 8 bots before Christmas, all because of a small dispute with the other server owner, Tokyo 😭

I mean I did wanted to release this bot sometime, but I guess now it’s just pushed for me to do it..

If you want to see what’re the upcoming bots I’m going to make, please join my server in my profile and check it out!

Anyways, I think I’m going a bit broader with my bot selections..first a xenomorph, now a damn alligator..

Oh well, more bizarre stuff is coming anyways!

I hope you guys enjoy the bot! And I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! 🖤🐊🤍

Extra pics!

don’t let those teeth bite..you know where..

She ain’t playing with those alligators bro

She’s so bad…

Okay bye!
creator: Capt
